programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Robert is back to see if Dr. Lee and Dr. Umar can remove his recurring head keloid for good; Justice has small lesions all over her body; Mike has hundreds of lipomas that bring him great discomfort.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Fit guy Alonso wants to show off his progress in the gym, but his 70 lipomas are holding him back; Porscha is a comic book enthusiast with two symmetrical lumps on her face; Jeffrey has a leaky lump named Larry on the back of his head.

programme.title: Two in a Million
programme.desc: Boys Giovanni and Owen share the rare condition Schwartz-Jampel Syndrome, which permanently and painfully contracts their muscles; the two share hardships and triumphs, and strike up a friendship.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Two in a Million
programme.desc: Tiffany and Destiny both live with the rare disease Osteogenesis Imperfecta, which causes brittle bones, and set out on a life changing journey to meet each other.

programme.title: Two in a Million
programme.desc: Bobbi and Kenny have skin that painfully grows in thick scales due to the rare condition Lamellar Ichthyosis.

programme.title: Cellblock 6: Female Lock Up
programme.desc: Eight women cope with their incarceration in Gwinnett County Jail; one woman prepares for her release.

programme.title: Cellblock 6: Female Lock Up
programme.sub-title: It Was Supposed To Be A Happy Day
programme.desc: A woman is arrested for smuggling drug paraphernalia into court; two heroin addicts turn to each other for support; a life of prostitution supports a woman's drug habit.

programme.title: Cellblock 6: Female Lock Up
programme.desc: A woman turns to drugs to numb the pain of her divorce; a crack addict attempts to head-butt an officer; a dental office assistant is arrested for stealing.

programme.title: Outrageous Births: Tales From the Crib
programme.desc: An emergency birth interrupts a wedding; a woman delivers after crashing her car; a baby with a life-threatening condition is born prematurely.

programme.title: Outrageous Births: Tales From the Crib
programme.desc: A baby is born twice; a woman in labor is torn apart by a tornado; a wife gives birth at home.

programme.title: Outrageous Births: Tales From the Crib
programme.desc: A woman goes into delivery while in a cab; a life-threatening pregnancy; twin sisters have their babies on the same day.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: A young boy at a sleepover party mysteriously loses control over his arms and legs; a woman is shot in the leg at her own bachelorette party; bubbles in a woman's arteries are causing a stroke.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: A patient suddenly starts seizing; an ER physician is at a restaurant when she is thrown into an emergency situation to save a child; a pregnant woman's heart is racing.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: A young pregnant woman in labor begs the ER doctor to keep her pregnancy a secret from her father; twins share confusing symptoms; a man with no pulse or blood pressure is still alive and breathing.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: A man is impaled in his abdomen by a stiletto heel; a seemingly healthy outdoorsman has a series of seizures that baffle his doctors; two patients make their doctor suspicious when they both complain about identical headaches that started during sex.

programme.desc: A patient's pet causes pandemonium; a man experiences paralysis that climbs up his legs to his chest until he can no longer breathe; a war veteran suffers from phantom pain in his amputated hand.

programme.title: Botched Bariatrics
programme.desc: Sean's nightmare keeps coming true, he can't stop pooping himself on stage; Tired of dealing with explosive bowels, Sean asks Dr. Hodges for help; Latoya wants to spend time with her kids again which means the 10 pound mass between her legs needs to go.

programme.title: Botched Bariatrics
programme.desc: After a botched lap band surgery, Christina has been blending her meals for over a decade; Dr. Caplin assists a patient whose tummy tuck has left her with a butt crack for a stomach.

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Dottie faces an unexpected challenge to her weight-loss when her husband's drinking problem becomes intolerable for her and her son; Cynthia starts to wonder if being there for her kids at her current weight is more important than losing more.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: With her weight loss, Laura is much less dependent on her husband Joey, who is now having trouble finding his place in their relationship; challenging patient Marla returns and the fireworks begin once again.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Despite having lost 378 pounds, Angel's crippling knee pain and history of extreme obesity threatens everything for which she's worked; Charity finds the strength to return to a normal life after post surgery complications.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: In order to keep pace with her daughter Charly's impressive weight loss, Charity must do something she's never done and find a way to go it alone.

programme.desc: Steven's dysfunction escalates, pushing his relationship with Dr. Nowzaradan; his brother Justin takes the leap to go to Houston to finally accept help.
